briefdescription.para: min gain step size used by GUI (hardware min = 1/16; 1/16..32/16 depending on actual gain )

memberdef.argsstring: (IsiSensorHandle_t handle, const uint16_t addr, const uint16_t value)
memberdef.name: Ox05b1s_IsiWriteRegIss

memberdef.argsstring: (IsiSensorHandle_t handle, const uint8_t mode, OX05B1S_ABmode_Setting_t setting)
memberdef.name: Ox05b1s_IsiSetABmodeGroup
